files.patch:
@@ -11,90 +11,24 @@ if [ ! -d "$CLAUDE_HOME" ] && [ -d "$HOME/claude" ]; then
   CLAUDE_HOME="$HOME/claude"
 fi
 
-IFS=$'\n'
-
-link_file () {
+link () {
   local src=$1 dst=$2
-
-  local overwrite_all=false backup_all=false
-  local overwrite= backup= skip=
-  local action=
-
-  if [ -f "$dst" -o -d "$dst" -o -L "$dst" ]; then
-    local currentSrc=""
-
-    if [ -L "$dst" ]; then
-      currentSrc="$(readlink "$dst")"
-    fi
-
-    if [ "$currentSrc" == "$src" ]; then
-      skip=true
-    else
-      echo "File already exists: $dst ($(basename "$src")), what do you want to do?"
-      echo "  [s]kip, [S]kip all, [o]verwrite, [O]verwrite all, [b]ackup, [B]ackup all?"
-      read -n 1 action
-
-      case "$action" in
-        o )
-          overwrite=true;;
-        O )
-          overwrite_all=true;;
-        b )
-          backup=true;;
-        B )
-          backup_all=true;;
-        s )
-          skip=true;;
-        S )
-          skip_all=true;;
-        * )
-          ;;
-      esac
-    fi
-
-    if [ "$overwrite" == "true" ]; then
-      rm -rf "$dst"
-      echo "removed $dst"
-    fi
-
-    if [ "$backup" == "true" ]; then
-      mv "$dst" "${dst}.backup"
-      echo "moved $dst to ${dst}.backup"
-    fi
-
-    if [ "$skip" == "true" ]; then
-      echo "skipped $src"
-    fi
+  if [ -L "$dst" ] && [ "$(readlink "$dst")" == "$src" ]; then
+    echo "exists: $dst"
+    return
   fi
-
-  if [ "$skip" != "true" ]; then
-    mkdir -p "$(dirname "$dst")"
-    ln -s "$src" "$dst"
-    echo "linked $src to $dst"
-  fi
-}
-
-list_skills () {
-  find -H "$SKILLS_ROOT" \
-    \( -type f -o -type l \) \
-    -not -path '*.git/*' \
-    -not -name '.DS_Store'
+  mkdir -p "$(dirname "$dst")"
+  ln -sf "$src" "$dst"
+  echo "linked: $dst -> $src"
 }
 
-install_skills () {
-  local target_skills=$1
-
-  for src in $(list_skills); do
-    relative=${src/"$SKILLS_ROOT"/''}
-    link_file "$src" "$target_skills$relative"
-  done
-}
-
-install_agents () {
-  link_file "$AGENTS_FILE" "$CODEX_HOME/AGENTS.md"
-  link_file "$AGENTS_FILE" "$CLAUDE_HOME/CLAUDE.md"
-}
+# Link each skill directory
+for skill in "$SKILLS_ROOT"/*/; do
+  skill_name=$(basename "$skill")
+  link "$skill" "$CODEX_HOME/skills/$skill_name"
+  link "$skill" "$CLAUDE_HOME/skills/$skill_name"
+done
 
-install_skills "$CODEX_HOME/skills"
-install_skills "$CLAUDE_HOME/skills"
-install_agents
+# Link AGENTS.md
+link "$AGENTS_FILE" "$CODEX_HOME/AGENTS.md"
+link "$AGENTS_FILE" "$CLAUDE_HOME/CLAUDE.md"
